description_long: This is a hardcover book with a predominantly yellow cover featuring playful, hand-drawn illustrations of two human figures, one male and one female, interacting with a large speech bubble. The cover design is whimsical and modern, with the figures rendered in a simple, cartoon-like style. The back cover is bright orange and filled with bold, white, hand-lettered text arranged in a dynamic, informal layout. The spine is yellow and includes a small illustration of a person, along with vertically oriented text. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with white pages visible from the side view. The overall appearance is vibrant and inviting, suggesting a lighthearted or humorous subject matter.
description: A hardcover book with a yellow illustrated cover featuring two cartoon figures and a large speech bubble, complemented by a bright orange, text-filled back cover.
description_view_0: The back cover is orange with bold, white, hand-lettered text filling most of the space.
description_view_1: The spine is yellow with vertically oriented text and a small illustration of a person.
description_view_2: The front cover is yellow, featuring two cartoon figures and a large speech bubble illustration.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the side, showing the white pages and the thickness of the book.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized illustration of two cartoon-like human figures, one male and one female, interacting with a large, white speech bubble. The artwork is playful and modern, with simple lines and a flat color palette, giving the cover a whimsical and approachable feel.
attribute_title_text: IRISHISMS BLATHER, BLARNEY BLESSINGS AND EVERYTHING ELSE WE SAY IN IRELAND
attribute_spine_design: The spine is yellow with vertically oriented text in a playful, hand-drawn style, and includes a small illustration of a person. The design is simple and matches the whimsical aesthetic of the front cover.
